get.description: Check API health status

List available OpenRouter models with filtering

Query Parameters:
- require_tools: Only models that support tool calling
- require_reasoning: Only models that support reasoning
- min_context: Minimum context length
- max_input_price: Maximum input price per 1M tokens (USD)
- max_output_price: Maximum output price per 1M tokens (USD)
- provider: Filter by provider (e.g., 'anthropic', 'openai', 'google')
- enabled_only: Only return enabled models (default: true)
- refresh: Force refresh from OpenRouter API (default: false)
Get statistics about available models
Get information about a specific model
Get list of all providers

Get models grouped by provider

Query Parameters:
- enabled_only: Only include enabled models (default: true)
- require_tools: Only models with tool calling support
- require_reasoning: Only models with reasoning support
Get database statistics

post.description: Force refresh database from OpenRouter API

delete.description: Clear all models from database (will be refetched on next request)

get.description: Root endpoint - API information

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether live Backpack trade execution is enabled for this request

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Execution exchange identifier. Reserved for Backpack v1.

AgentBackpackExecutionContext.title: AgentBackpackExecutionContext
AgentBackpackExecutionContext.description: Optional Backpack execution gate supplied by the frontend.

scope_id.title: Scope Id
scope_id.description: Optional memory scope for the chat session

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Optional user ID for Mem0 long-term memory

conversation_style.title: Conversation Style
conversation_style.description: Response style: normal, learning, concise, explanatory, or formal

trading_style.title: Trading Style
trading_style.description: Trading analysis style: balanced, price_action, trend_following, momentum_breakout, mean_reversion, smart_money, risk_first, or systematic

market_context.description: Optional frontend market scope and market-state context

backpack_execution.description: Optional frontend gate controlling whether Backpack live execution is allowed

drift_execution.description: Optional frontend gate controlling whether Drift live execution is allowed

AgentChatRequest.title: AgentChatRequest
AgentChatRequest.description: Request body for multimodal agent chat.

AgentChatResponse.title: AgentChatResponse
AgentChatResponse.description: Response body for multimodal agent chat.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether live Drift trade execution is enabled for this request

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Execution exchange identifier. Reserved for Drift v1.

AgentDriftExecutionContext.title: AgentDriftExecutionContext
AgentDriftExecutionContext.description: Optional Drift execution gate supplied by the frontend.

AgentMarketContext.title: AgentMarketContext
AgentMarketContext.description: Optional asset scope and market-state context supplied by the frontend.

AgentMarketStateContext.title: AgentMarketStateContext
AgentMarketStateContext.description: Optional market-state hints supplied by the frontend.

AgentNewsContext.title: AgentNewsContext
AgentNewsContext.description: Optional news-headline hints supplied by the frontend.

AgentUploadDeleteResponse.title: AgentUploadDeleteResponse
AgentUploadDeleteResponse.description: Response for deleting a temporary upload.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of assets in the category

asset_count.title: Asset Count
asset_count.description: Number of tracked assets in this category

AssetCategoryItem.title: AssetCategoryItem
AssetCategoryItem.description: One available asset category and its asset count.

AssetNewsItem.title: AssetNewsItem
AssetNewsItem.description: One news item for a tracked asset.

query.title: Query
query.description: Search query used to match assets

market_type.title: Market Type
market_type.description: Drift market type. v1 defaults to perp.

symbol.title: Symbol
symbol.description: Optional market symbol such as SOL-PERP

side.title: Side
side.description: Order side such as long, short, buy, or sell

order_type.title: Order Type
order_type.description: Order type such as limit or market

base_asset_amount.title: Base Asset Amount
base_asset_amount.description: Base asset amount as a string to preserve precision

DriftExecutionPrepareRequest.title: DriftExecutionPrepareRequest
DriftExecutionPrepareRequest.description: Prepare a same-wallet Drift execution intent for client-side signing.

DriftExecutionRecordResponse.title: DriftExecutionRecordResponse
DriftExecutionRecordResponse.description: Prepared or submitted Drift execution record.

signed_transaction.title: Signed Transaction
signed_transaction.description: Signed transaction bytes encoded as base64 or base58

transaction_encoding.title: Transaction Encoding
transaction_encoding.description: Signed transaction encoding: base64 (default) or base58

skip_preflight.title: Skip Preflight
skip_preflight.description: Whether to skip preflight on submit

DriftExecutionSubmitRequest.title: DriftExecutionSubmitRequest
DriftExecutionSubmitRequest.description: Submit a signed same-wallet Drift transaction.

DriftExecutionSubmitResponse.title: DriftExecutionSubmitResponse
DriftExecutionSubmitResponse.description: Submission response for a signed same-wallet Drift transaction.

DriftExecutionWalletResponse.title: DriftExecutionWalletResponse
DriftExecutionWalletResponse.description: Resolved Drift execution-wallet status for one authenticated user.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Optional user ID override. In production this should come from auth.

api_key.title: Api Key
api_key.description: Exchange API key or public verification key

api_secret.title: Api Secret
api_secret.description: Exchange API secret or signing private key

trading_enabled.title: Trading Enabled
trading_enabled.description: Whether this stored connection may be used for live execution

read_only.title: Read Only
read_only.description: Whether this stored connection is restricted to read-only usage

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Whether this connection becomes the active connection for its exchange

ExchangeConnectionCreateRequest.title: ExchangeConnectionCreateRequest
ExchangeConnectionCreateRequest.description: Create a stored exchange connection for a user.

ExchangeConnectionDeleteResponse.title: ExchangeConnectionDeleteResponse
ExchangeConnectionDeleteResponse.description: Delete response for one exchange connection.

ExchangeConnectionListResponse.title: ExchangeConnectionListResponse
ExchangeConnectionListResponse.description: List response for stored exchange connections.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Optional user ID override. In production this should come from auth.

ExchangeConnectionUpdateRequest.title: ExchangeConnectionUpdateRequest
ExchangeConnectionUpdateRequest.description: Update non-secret metadata for a stored exchange connection.

ExecutionAccessExchangeStatus.title: ExecutionAccessExchangeStatus
ExecutionAccessExchangeStatus.description: Unified frontend-friendly execution access status for one exchange.

ExecutionAccessResponse.title: ExecutionAccessResponse
ExecutionAccessResponse.description: Unified execution access response for Backpack and Drift.

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: User ID that owns the memory

MemoryCreateResponse.title: MemoryCreateResponse
MemoryCreateResponse.description: Response for creating a user memory.

MemoryListResponse.title: MemoryListResponse
MemoryListResponse.description: Response for listing or searching user memories.

OpenRouterSessionCostPhaseResponse.title: OpenRouterSessionCostPhaseResponse
OpenRouterSessionCostPhaseResponse.description: One aggregated OpenRouter usage phase inside a chat/session scope.

OpenRouterSessionCostResponse.title: OpenRouterSessionCostResponse
OpenRouterSessionCostResponse.description: Accumulated OpenRouter usage and estimated cost for one scope_id session.

primary_category.title: Primary Category
primary_category.description: Primary category used for fallback matching

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of related assets returned

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of configured tracked assets

rank.title: Rank
rank.description: Rank position in the trending list

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of trending assets returned

ranking_method.title: Ranking Method
ranking_method.description: Short description of the lightweight ranking approach

wallet_address.title: Wallet Address
wallet_address.description: Solana wallet address that will sign the challenge

WalletAuthNonceRequest.title: WalletAuthNonceRequest
WalletAuthNonceRequest.description: Request a mobile wallet sign-in challenge.

WalletAuthNonceResponse.title: WalletAuthNonceResponse
WalletAuthNonceResponse.description: Sign-in challenge to be signed by the wallet.

wallet_address.title: Wallet Address
wallet_address.description: Solana wallet address that signed the challenge

nonce.title: Nonce
nonce.description: Challenge nonce returned by the backend

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: Signed message bytes encoded as base64 or base58

message.title: Message
message.description: Optional original challenge message for client-side roundtrip validation

WalletAuthVerifyRequest.title: WalletAuthVerifyRequest
WalletAuthVerifyRequest.description: Verify a signed mobile wallet challenge.

WalletAuthVerifyResponse.title: WalletAuthVerifyResponse
WalletAuthVerifyResponse.description: JWT/token response after wallet challenge verification.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Platform metadata and backend health endpoints.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Wallet authentication, nonce generation, verification, and current identity.

tags.name: Agent
tags.description: Multimodal uploads, chat, and SSE streaming chat endpoints.

tags.name: Memory
tags.description: Mem0-backed memory health and CRUD/search behavior.

tags.name: Exchange Connections
tags.description: Execution access state and Backpack credential management.

tags.name: Drift
tags.description: Same-wallet Drift execution prepare and submit flow.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Asset lookup, categories, summaries, trending, related assets, and OHLC.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: OpenRouter model catalog, model database operations, and accumulated session cost.
